entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A dryland crop rich in protein and minerals, serving as a staple food in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental factors challenging global food production

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: A climate change factor that pearl millet can withstand up to 42 degrees Celsius

entities.name: CO2 EMISSIONS
entities.description: A climate change factor challenging food production

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A climate change factor that pearl millet withstands

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A nutritional trait of pearl millet, comprising 15% of its content

entities.name: MINERALS
entities.description: Essential nutritional traits including P, K, Ca, Mg, Fe, and Zn found in pearl millet

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A location in the semi-arid tropics where pearl millet is a staple and malnutrition is addressed

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A location in the semi-arid tropics where pearl millet is a staple

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A location where biofortified pearl millet varieties are disseminated to reduce malnutrition

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The concept of providing essential nutrients for health and food security

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity of genetic material in pearl millet used to improve nutrition

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: A method to improve the mineral and vitamin content of grains

entities.name: GENOMIC TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Modern technological methods used to accelerate the mainstreaming of biofortification traits

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: A method used to accelerate the development of biofortification traits

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: A systematic method to include essential nutrition traits in pearl millet products

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition of nutrient deficiency that biofortified varieties aim to reduce

entities.name: HUMAN WELL-BEING
entities.description: The overall state of health and prosperity resulting from nutri-dense food products
